# Stellmare Project Memory

The Stellmare SaaS platform lives at `C:\Users\nickc\Desktop\Dev\Stellmare\`.

Before doing ANY Stellmare work, read `STATUS.md` at the Stellmare repo root.
It contains:
- Current phase and scope
- Infrastructure status (script ID, env vars, DNS)
- Task tracker (completed, in progress, not started)
- Key decisions and their rationale
- Known issues

After completing work on Stellmare, UPDATE `STATUS.md` to reflect:
- Any tasks completed (move to Completed section)
- Any new tasks discovered (add to appropriate section)
- Any decisions made (add to Key Decisions table)
- Any new known issues
- Update the "Last updated" date at the top
